# ClockCyteR.spatial [![ClockCyteR.spatial](reference/figures/ClockCyteR.spatial_HEX.png)](https://github.com/cabaJr/ClockCyteR.spatial)

[![Lifecycle:
experimental](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-experimental-orange.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#experimental)
[![codecov](https://codecov.io/github/cabaJr/ClockCyteR.spatial/graph/badge.svg?token=RT9D0M2QLI)](https://codecov.io/github/cabaJr/ClockCyteR.spatial)
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/cabaJr/ClockCyteR.spatial/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/cabaJr/ClockCyteR.spatial/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![Last
Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/cabaJr/ClockCyteR.spatial)](https://github.com/cabaJr/ClockCyteR.spatial)

  

## Overview

ClockCyteR.spatial is an R package for spatiotemporal analysis of
circadian rhythms from multichannel live-imaging time series. Starting
from fluorescence intensity data extracted from user-defined regions of
interest, it estimates circadian parameters (period, phase, amplitude)
at single-cell resolution, maps them spatially, and computes
network-level synchrony metrics. The package was developed for
organotypic Suprachiasmatic Nucleus (SCN) slices but is applicable to
any spatially resolved oscillatory time series.

![ClockCyteR.spatial
vignette](reference/figures/ClockCyteR.spatial_vignette.png)

## Installation

You can install the development version of ClockCyteR.spatial from
GitHub:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("cabaJr/ClockCyteR.spatial")
```

## Prerequisites: ImageJ preprocessing

Before using ClockCyteR.spatial, raw multichannel TIFF time series must
be preprocessed in FIJI/ImageJ to generate the required `_results`
folder structure. A set of ImageJ macros for this step is available in
the companion repository:
[ClockCyteR.FIJI](https://github.com/cabaJr/ClockCyteR.FIJI)

The macros should be run in order:

1.  `1.Rotate_expand_stack` — align and crop stacks to a consistent
    orientation
2.  `2.Extract_hemislices` — extract left/right SCN hemislices from the
    full stack
3.  `3.Define_ROI` — define the SCN nucleus ROI and extract intensity
    profiles
4.  `4.Extract_cellgrid_cycle` — create the measurement grid and extract
    per-cell intensities

Steps 3 and 4 generate the `_results/` folders consumed by
[`index_files()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/index_files.md).

## Citation

If you use ClockCyteR.spatial in your research, please cite:

Ferrari et al. (2026, Advanced Science). *A high-throughput live imaging
platform to investigate circuit-dependent regulation of circadian
rhythms in brain tissue.*

## Usage

A template to run the code using the toy dataset is available here.

``` r

# Copy the toy dataset to a writable location (avoids writing into the package folder)
base_dir <- setup_example()           # or setup_example("~/my_analysis") for a persistent copy

params <- make_params(
  channels = list(
    Ch1 = list(
      enabled = FALSE,
      label = "red_channel",
      grid_file = "Ch1_1_grid_vals.csv"
    ),
    Ch2 = list(
      enabled = TRUE,
      label = "Syn-Axon-GCaMP6s",
      grid_file = "Ch2_2_grid_vals.csv"
    ),
    Ch3 = list(
      enabled = FALSE,
      label = "Brightfield",
      grid_file = "Ch3_3_grid_vals.csv"
    )
  ),
  coherence = TRUE,
  normalize_phase = TRUE,
  time_res = 0.5,
  intervals = list("interval1" = c(0, 72)),
  time_window = TRUE,
  pixel_fct = 2.82,
  plotting = list(
    y_limits_from_previous = FALSE,
    align = list("Ch2" = "12"),
    colors = list(
      Ch2 = "darkgreen"
    )
  ),
  folder_structure = list(
    base_dir = base_dir # change to your actual folder when using your own data
  )
)

# index files ####
file_rows <- index_files(paths = params$paths)

# analyze project ####
analysis_results <- analyze_project(file_rows = file_rows,
                                    params = params)

# calculate plot ranges
ranges <- ranges_calculation(params = params, file_rows = file_rows)
params$plotting$ranges <- ranges

# Visualization ####

# generate plots
generate_plots(file_rows =  file_rows, params = params)

# pull plots in a simple folder
pull_plots(params = params, file_rows = file_rows)

# generate file reports
generate_reports(params = params, file_rows = file_rows)
generate_plot_type_reports(params = params, file_rows = file_rows)
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_coherence_metrics()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/add_coherence_metrics.md)
  : add_coherence_metrics
- [`analyze_channel()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/analyze_channel.md)
  : analyze_channel
- [`analyze_file()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/analyze_file.md)
  : analyze_file
- [`analyze_interval()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/analyze_interval.md)
  : analyze_interval
- [`analyze_project()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/analyze_project.md)
  : analyze_project
- [`assign_cluster_colors()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/assign_cluster_colors.md)
  : Assign colors to clusters
- [`build_plot_path()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/build_plot_path.md)
  : Build the file path for a single plot output
- [`check_fit()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/check_fit.md)
  : Plot observed vs fitted time series for a single cell
- [`check_phase()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/check_phase.md)
  : Plot phase distribution across cells
- [`circStats_plot()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/circStats_plot.md)
  : Circular stats plot with per-group mean arrows
- [`circular_plot()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/circular_plot.md)
  : Circular phase plot with optional mean-phase alignment
- [`clockcyter_example_path()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/clockcyter_example_path.md)
  : Path to the toy dataset folder
- [`computePeriod()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/computePeriod.md)
  : Run FFT-NLLS period analysis on a fluorescence trace matrix
- [`create_plot()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/create_plot.md)
  : Dispatch a plot by type
- [`doughnut_plot()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/doughnut_plot.md)
  : Doughnut chart of cluster abundance
- [`extract_vars()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/extract_vars.md)
  : Extract variables from analysis results across files and save as
  wide tables
- [`filter_edges()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/filter_edges.md)
  : Filter network edges or vertices belonging to NULL clusters
- [`generate_plot_type_reports()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/generate_plot_type_reports.md)
  : generate_plot_type_reports
- [`generate_plots()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/generate_plots.md)
  : generate_plots
- [`generate_reports()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/generate_reports.md)
  : generate_reports
- [`get_grid_coords()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/get_grid_coords.md)
  : Import and scale grid centroid coordinates
- [`hist_plot()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/hist_plot.md)
  : Histogram or bar chart of a node variable
- [`importGridVals()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/importGridVals.md)
  : Import all values from kernel extraction
- [`importROI()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/importROI.md)
  : function to import a single ROI
- [`index_files()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/index_files.md)
  : index_files
- [`make_params()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/make_params.md)
  : make_params
- [`metric_mean_plot()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/metric_mean_plot.md)
  : Mean ± SE plot of a metric stratified by group with optional
  significance brackets
- [`network_analysis()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/network_analysis.md)
  : Build and cluster a cell correlation network
- [`order_clusters()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/order_clusters.md)
  : Reorder and relabel network clusters
- [`period_print()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/period_print.md)
  : Jitter plot of per-cell period lengths
- [`phase_distribution()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/phase_distribution.md)
  : Kernel density plot of phase distribution for one or two channels
- [`plot_group_traces()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/plot_group_traces.md)
  : Mean ± SE trace plot for each group
- [`plot_overlap_heatmap()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/plot_overlap_heatmap.md)
  : Cluster segregation heatmap
- [`plot_type_to_name()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/plot_type_to_name.md)
  : Translate a plot-type key to its output filename stem
- [`prepare_file()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/prepare_file.md)
  : prepare_file
- [`preprocess_data()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/preprocess_data.md)
  : Remove outliers, smooth, and detrend fluorescence traces
- [`pull_plots()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/pull_plots.md)
  : Copy plot files into a centralised output directory
- [`pull_rds()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/pull_rds.md)
  : Copy RDS result files into a centralised output directory
- [`ranges_calculation()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/ranges_calculation.md)
  : Compute per-variable display ranges across all files and intervals
- [`setup_example()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/setup_example.md)
  : Copy the toy dataset to a writable location
- [`spatial_clusters_plot()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/spatial_clusters_plot.md)
  : Spatial scatter plot of cluster assignments
- [`threeDplot()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/threeDplot.md)
  : Interactive 3D scatter plot via plotly
- [`traces_correlation()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/traces_correlation.md)
  : collection of funtions used in network analysis Compute pairwise
  cell correlations and return edge list
- [`validate_params()`](https://cabajr.github.io/ClockCyteR.spatial/reference/validate_params.md)
  : validate_params
